subcodes.first_line: This is the Most Glorious Book unto him who hath grasped the cord of guidance. O Mustafá! Hearken unto My call from the direction of the Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب الابهی الی الذی تمسک بحبل الهدی ان یا مصطفی اسمع ندائی عن شطر السجن
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @proclamation to the people of the world
